
# Canon Source Manifest — Batch 10

Primary canon authority: uploaded V28_8 DnD World Repository.

## Hard rules
- Locality identity is driven from V28_8 locality packets.
- Named NPC placement must not be casually shifted between nearby settlements.
- Bestiary and hazards must come from canon-supported support layers.

## Explicit placement corrections retained in this batch
- Jorva Helmrune -> Harvest Circle
- Researcher Toman Iceveil -> Glasswake Commune

## Runtime limitation
This batch adds placement audit scaffolding, not the final full named-NPC placement pass.


## Batch 10 note
This batch adds broader placement-audit scaffolding and richer late-stage family content, but it is still not the final full named-NPC placement pass.
